name: Data Exfiltration Response
description: Responds to suspected data exfiltration alerts from DLP or network monitoring systems. Riggs AI analyzes the alert using the data exfiltration template to confirm unauthorized data transfer. Confirmed exfiltration triggers immediate containment: the destination IP is blocked on the firewall and the source host is isolated via EDR. An IR lead approval gate controls the investigation scope before generating an executive summary, creating a P1 incident ticket with a full timeline, and notifying the CISO and legal team via email. False positives are annotated and closed.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: CrowdStrike Falcon
required_integrations.reason: Isolate the source host to halt ongoing data exfiltration

required_integrations.name: Palo Alto NGFW
required_integrations.reason: Block the exfiltration destination IP at the network perimeter

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create P1 incident ticket with full exfiltration timeline for compliance and legal

config.description: Triggers on DLP policy violations, anomalous large data transfers, or network-based exfiltration detection alerts

config.additional_instructions: Evaluate transfer volume against baseline, classify destination risk, check for compression or encryption before transfer, and assess user context including role and recent behavior.
config.description: AI-powered data exfiltration analysis evaluating volume anomalies, destination reputation, data sensitivity, and user context
Routes based on whether Riggs AI confirmed unauthorized data exfiltration activity
Blocks the exfiltration destination IP on the Palo Alto NGFW to immediately halt outbound data transfer

parameters.comment: Isolated due to confirmed data exfiltration — Alert: {{trigger_1.alert.alert_id}}, Destination: {{trigger_1.alert.destination_ip}}

config.description: Network-isolates the source host via CrowdStrike EDR to prevent further data exfiltration or lateral movement
Requires IR lead approval before escalating with executive summary generation, P1 incident creation, and CISO/legal notification

config.additional_instructions: Summarize the data exfiltration incident for CISO and legal stakeholders. Include business impact, data sensitivity classification, containment actions taken, and recommended next steps.
config.description: Generates a management-level executive summary of the data exfiltration incident with business impact, timeline, and recommended actions
Creates a P1 incident ticket in Jira with full exfiltration timeline, containment actions, AI analysis, and executive summary for compliance and legal tracking

data.label: Notify CISO and Legal via Email

notify.subject: P1 DATA EXFILTRATION INCIDENT — {{trigger_1.alert.hostname}}

config.description: Sends a critical-priority email notification to the CISO and legal team with the executive summary, incident details, and Jira ticket reference

parameters.note: Data exfiltration analysis by Riggs AI returned verdict: {{analyze_1.verdict}}. Determined to be a false positive — normal data transfer activity. No containment actions required. Closing alert.

config.description: Annotates the alert as a false positive (normal data transfer) based on AI analysis and closes it without containment action
